stimulus: Pumice is a kind of volcanic rock formed when frothy lava cools so quickly that gas bubbles become trapped inside it. You ______blank more about pumice’s low density, which allows it to float on water, in a later section.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The convention being tested is the use of verbs to express tense. The future tense “will read,” together with the phrase “in a later section,” correctly indicates that the reader will encounter this information later.

Choices B, C, and D are all past or perfect forms inconsistent with a future event in “a later section.”
